subject: Read-only context-cost residue sanity check
body: If you are still available, please take this as a read-only support task only; no source edits, no claim unless your workflow requires a read-only claim. Exact scope: agent-tools/src/context-cost/cli-options.ts, cli.integration.test.ts, file-system-node.ts, file-system.ts, format.ts, per-file.unit.test.ts, agent-tools/src/context-cost/test-helpers/context-cost-fixture.ts, agent-tools/README.md, .agent/analysis/practice-context-cost-baseline.md, and .agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/future/memetic-immune-system-and-progressive-disclosure.plan.md. Question: do you see any remaining blocker in the reviewer-fix residue before I author the follow-on plan and commit? Please report findings in comms, prioritised, with file paths. Do not touch the git index.
